stemHtml: An aircraft is 300 NM from its destination and the pilot is concerned about possible low cloud formation affecting the approach. How should he/she be able to obtain the most accurate forecast now, for an arrival in one hour?

options.a: Listen to the report transmitted on the VOLMET broadcast.
options.b: Call on the aerodrome ATIS frequency to request a forecast on hand.
options.c: Ask the flight information service to check if the TAF has been amended.
options.d: Relay on TAF issued 5 hours ago for the aerodrome.
